metadata.title: Obillz — Run your sports club without losing your evenings
metadata.description: Invoices, members, fees, events and payments in one platform built for sports clubs.

hero.title: Run your club without losing your evenings.
hero.subtitle: Invoices, members, membership fees, events and payments in one platform built for sports clubs.
hero.hubBaseline: Your whole club, in one place.

flow.mobileHint: All your tools in one place

problem.title: Clearer management, less time wasted.
problem.subtitle: Obillz helps your committee centralise important information, cut repetitive tasks and keep a clear view of the club.

cards.title: Save time every week
cards.description: Centralise repetitive tasks and stop bouncing between spreadsheets, WhatsApp and scattered documents.

cards.title: Keep a clear overview
cards.description: Track members, payments, events and key documents from a single workspace.

cards.title: Work better as a committee
cards.description: Invite the right people, assign the right access and make collaboration easier.

cards.title: Avoid missed deadlines
cards.description: Stay on top of fees, contracts, due dates and other important club information.

cards.title: Modernise your organisation
cards.description: Give your club cleaner, more structured and more professional management.

cards.title: Grow at your own pace
cards.description: Start with the essentials, then use Obillz based on your club's real needs.

clubReassurance.title: Built with clubs, for clubs.
clubReassurance.subtitle: Obillz isn't just admin software. The platform is built from real club life, committee needs and feedback from clubs using it.

cards.title: Real knowledge of club life
cards.description: The founder has been involved in sports clubs since childhood and understands the daily challenges faced by volunteers and committees.

cards.title: Concrete needs
cards.description: Obillz addresses situations clubs actually face: managing members, tracking fees, organising events, renewing sponsors and centralising documents.

cards.title: A platform that evolves
cards.description: Feedback from clubs using Obillz drives continuous improvements, so the platform stays simple, useful and grounded in real club life.

howItWorks.label: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: Create your workspace, set up your club, then use Obillz at your own pace.
howItWorks.reassurance: No need to prepare everything on day one — Obillz adapts to how your committee actually runs.
howItWorks.ctaNote: 7 days free, no credit card required.

steps.title: Create your account
steps.description: Sign up for free and access your Obillz workspace in just a few minutes.

steps.title: Set up your club
steps.description: Add your club's basic information and invite committee members if you wish.

steps.title: Progress at your own pace
steps.description: Start with the modules useful to your club: members, fees, invoices, schedules, events or sponsors. Everything is already included.

askChatGpt.title: Still not sure Obillz is right for your club?
askChatGpt.subtitle: Talk directly with the founder. Ask your questions and find out how Obillz can simplify your club management.
askChatGpt.message: Hello, I'd like to learn more about Obillz.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title: One plan. All of Obillz included.
pricing.headline: Give your committee a tool worthy of their commitment.
pricing.body: Running a club already takes enough time. Obillz brings members, fees, finances, events, sponsors and committee collaboration together in one easy-to-use platform.
pricing.reassurance: For less than CHF 1.35 per day, centralize your entire club management on a single platform.
pricing.subtitle: Every tool to run your club — no hidden modules or complicated fees.
pricing.planDescription: Everything you need to run your club.
pricing.cardReassurance: Built for volunteer committees who want one place for club management — not a pile of separate tools.
pricing.standardDescription: Main club account — all management features.
pricing.teamDescription: Several committee members, each with their own access.

faq.subtitle: Find answers to the most common questions about Obillz, how it works, and your subscription.
faq.reassurance: Clear answers, no jargon — so you can move forward with confidence.

items.question: Is Obillz suitable for all sports clubs?
items.answer: Yes. Football, hockey, tennis, volleyball or local associations: members, fees, invoices, events and schedules in one place.

items.question: How long to set up the club?
items.answer: A few minutes to create your space. Add members and launch your first fees whenever you're ready.

items.question: Do members need to install an app?
items.answer: No. Pay, sign up for events or get info via links and QR codes — no app required.

items.question: What happens after the {days}-day trial?
items.answer: After {days} days, the account becomes read-only. Your data stays visible; editing returns with a subscription.

items.question: What does the Obillz subscription include?
items.answer: The Obillz subscription gives you access to all the platform's main features: member management, fees, events, sponsors, documents, finances and committee access. The goal is a simple, clear and complete offer — without multiple plans.

items.question: Can I cancel my subscription?
items.answer: Yes, anytime. Access stays active until the end of the paid period.

items.question: Why choose yearly billing?
items.answer: 2 months free compared to monthly — ideal for long-term use.

items.question: Is my data secure?
items.answer: Yes. Secure hosting, protected access and payments via Stripe.

finalCta.title: Your club deserves better than a spreadsheet.
finalCta.subtitle: Centralise your management and save time starting now.
finalCta.loginPrompt: Already have an account? Log in

footer.description: Software to run your sports club: members, fees, invoices, events and payments — all in one place.
